# Web Design Guidelines Reference Library

Domain knowledge reference for web design guidelines and UI/UX best practices.
Content loaded from the original global skill on demand.

See `~/.claude/skills/web-design-guidelines/` for full content including:
- Accessibility standards (WCAG compliance)
- Responsive design patterns
- Typography best practices
- Color theory and palette construction
- Layout and spacing systems
- Component design guidelines

## When to Load

Load `~/.claude/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md` when:
- Designing new pages or components with accessibility requirements
- Choosing typography, color palettes, or spacing systems
- Reviewing UI for design guideline compliance
- Building responsive layouts
